lessons.title: What is Energy?
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Understanding energy as the ability to do work.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Energy is the ability to do work. It makes things move, grow, and change. Without energy, nothing in the world could work. In this lesson, you will learn what energy is and why it is important.

## Main Content

**What Is Energy?**

Energy is the power that makes things happen. The Sun gives energy to Earth. Food gives energy to our bodies. Electricity gives energy to our homes. Energy comes in many forms and is all around us every day.

blocks.content: Energy is the ability to do work. It makes things move, grow, and change. Without energy, nothing in the world could work. In this lesson, you will learn what energy is and why it is important.

terms.definition: The ability to do work
The ability to make things happen
Where something comes from
Using energy to make something happen

lessons.titleThai: พลังงานคืออะไร?

lessons.title: Light Energy
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Understanding light as a form of energy from the Sun and other sources.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Light is a form of energy that helps us see the world around us. The Sun is the biggest source of light on Earth. In this lesson, you will learn about light energy and how it works.

## Main Content

**Light Energy**

Light travels in straight lines. It can pass through transparent objects. Light bounces off shiny surfaces. Without light energy, we could not see anything. Light also carries heat energy from the Sun to warm the Earth.

blocks.content: Light is a form of energy that helps us see the world around us. The Sun is the biggest source of light on Earth. In this lesson, you will learn about light energy and how it works.

terms.definition: A form of energy that helps us see
A material that lets light pass through
To bounce light off a surface
A path that does not curve or bend

lessons.titleThai: พลังงานแสง

lessons.title: Sound Energy
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Understanding sound as a form of energy created by vibrations.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Sound is another form of energy. It is created by vibrations. When something vibrates, it makes sound waves that travel through the air to our ears. In this lesson, you will learn about sound energy.

## Main Content

**How Sound Works**

Sound is made by vibrations. When you pluck a guitar string, it vibrates and makes sound. Sound travels through air, water, and solids. Loud sounds have more energy than soft sounds. High-pitched sounds vibrate faster than low-pitched sounds.

blocks.content: Sound is another form of energy. It is created by vibrations. When something vibrates, it makes sound waves that travel through the air to our ears.

terms.definition: Energy that travels through the air as vibrations
A rapid back-and-forth movement

terms.thai: ระดับเสียง
terms.definition: How high or low a sound is
A disturbance that carries energy

lessons.titleThai: พลังงานเสียง

lessons.title: Heat Energy
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Understanding heat as a form of energy that causes temperature changes.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Heat is a form of energy that makes things warm. It flows from hot objects to cold objects. In this lesson, you will learn about heat energy and how it affects the world around us.

## Main Content

**Heat Energy**

Heat energy moves from hot things to cold things. The Sun gives us heat energy. Fire produces heat energy. Our bodies produce heat energy. Heat can change materials: it can melt ice, boil water, and warm food.

blocks.content: Heat is a form of energy that makes things warm. It flows from hot objects to cold objects. In this lesson, you will learn about heat energy and how it affects the world around us.

terms.definition: Energy that makes things warm
How hot or cold something is
Having a moderate amount of heat
Having little heat energy

lessons.titleThai: พลังงานความร้อน

lessons.title: Energy Sources
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Different sources of energy: Sun, fuel, electricity, and food.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Where does our energy come from? Energy comes from many different sources. The Sun is the most important source of energy on Earth. In this lesson, you will learn about different energy sources.

## Main Content

**Types of Energy Sources**

The Sun is the ultimate source of energy for most life on Earth. Plants use sunlight to make food. We burn fuel like wood, coal, and oil for heat and electricity. Batteries store energy for portable devices. Food gives our bodies the energy we need to live.

blocks.content: Where does our energy come from? Energy comes from many different sources. The Sun is the most important source of energy on Earth.

terms.thai: เชื้อเพลิง
terms.definition: Materials burned to produce heat or electricity
Energy that powers lights, machines, and devices
A device that stores energy for later use

terms.thai: หมุนเวียนได้
terms.definition: An energy source that can be replaced naturally

lessons.titleThai: แหล่งพลังงาน

lessons.title: Energy Conversion
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - How energy changes from one form to another.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Energy can change from one form to another. A light bulb changes electricity into light and heat. Your body changes food energy into movement. In this lesson, you will learn about energy conversion.

## Main Content

**Changing Energy**

Energy conversion is when energy changes from one form to another. When you turn on a flashlight, electrical energy becomes light energy. When you rub your hands together, movement energy becomes heat energy. Energy is never created or destroyed, it only changes form.

blocks.content: Energy can change from one form to another. A light bulb changes electricity into light and heat. Your body changes food energy into movement. In this lesson, you will learn about energy conversion.

terms.definition: To change from one form to another

terms.thai: พลังงานไฟฟ้า
terms.definition: Energy carried by electric currents

terms.thai: พลังงานเคมี
terms.definition: Energy stored in food, fuel, and batteries

lessons.titleThai: การเปลี่ยนแปลงพลังงาน

lessons.title: Energy Lab
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Hands-on experiments exploring different forms of energy.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Today you will explore different forms of energy through hands-on experiments. You will observe light, sound, and heat energy in action.

## Main Content

**Lab Activities**

Test how mirrors reflect light. Use a rubber band to make sound by stretching and releasing it. Feel the heat from a lamp. Record your observations and identify the energy forms you observed.

blocks.content: Today you will explore different forms of energy through hands-on experiments. You will observe light, sound, and heat energy in action.

terms.definition: To learn about something by looking at it carefully
To look at something carefully and notice details
The way something appears or exists

lessons.titleThai: ห้องปฏิบัติการพลังงาน

lessons.title: Saving Energy
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Why saving energy is important and how we can conserve it.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Energy is valuable, but some energy sources can pollute the environment. Learning to save energy helps protect the Earth. In this lesson, you will learn why saving energy is important and how you can help.

## Main Content

**Why Save Energy?**

Saving energy reduces pollution and helps the environment. You can save energy by turning off lights when you leave a room, using less water, walking instead of driving, and choosing natural light during the day.

blocks.content: Energy is valuable, but some energy sources can pollute the environment. Learning to save energy helps protect the Earth.

terms.definition: To use something carefully so it is not wasted
Harmful substances that damage the environment
To use more than you need

lessons.titleThai: การประหยัดพลังงาน

lessons.title: Unit 5 Review
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Review activity for forms and sources of energy.
lessons.content:
## Review Activity

Test your understanding of energy! Identify different forms of energy, match energy sources to their uses, and demonstrate energy conversion.

blocks.content: Test your understanding of energy! Identify different forms of energy, match energy sources to their uses, and demonstrate energy conversion.

lessons.title: Unit 5 Summative Assessment
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Summative assessment covering forms, sources, and conservation of energy.
lessons.content:
## Summative Assessment

This assessment covers everything you learned about energy in Unit 5. You will be tested on different forms of energy, energy sources, and energy conservation.

blocks.content: This assessment covers everything you learned about energy in Unit 5. Good luck!

lessons.titleThai: แบบทดสอบปลายหน่วย หน่วย 5

lessons.title: Energy Show
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Presenting energy experiments and demonstrations to classmates.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Show what you know about energy! Today you will present energy experiments and demonstrations to your classmates. Sharing your learning helps everyone understand energy better.

## Main Content

**Presenting Your Work**

Choose an energy experiment to demonstrate. Explain the energy form involved. Show how energy conversion happens. Answer questions from your classmates. Be a confident science communicator!

blocks.content: Show what you know about energy! Today you will present energy experiments and demonstrations to your classmates.

terms.definition: To show and explain something to others
To share information with others

terms.thai: แสดงให้เห็น
terms.definition: To show how something works

lessons.titleThai: การแสดงพลังงาน

lessons.title: Science Journal: Energy
lessons.description: Grade 3 ENERGY ALL AROUND US - Recording observations and findings about energy in a science journal.
lessons.content:
## Introduction

Today you will use your science journal to record everything you learned about energy in this unit. Keep detailed records of your observations and experiments.

## Main Content

**Recording Energy Learning**

Draw pictures of different energy forms. Write down examples of energy sources you found. Record your energy experiments and their results. Note any questions you still have about energy.

blocks.content: Today you will use your science journal to record everything you learned about energy in this unit.

terms.definition: A book where you record observations and ideas
To write down information for later use

lessons.titleThai: วารสารวิทยาศาสตร์: พลังงาน
